title: hieracium transiens subsp. asterocymum
intro: Hieracium transiens subsp. asterocymum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium transiens subsp. asterocymum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical ointment or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
